ops.text: Fix Fitness App hallucination: Stream Audio + Atomic Image Turn

operations.message: ✨ AI: The original block was a `sendRealtimeInput` stream, which is not present in the file; the patch needs to replace the synchronous turn logic instead....
operations.explanation: The original block was a `sendRealtimeInput` stream, which is not present in the file; the patch needs to replace the synchronous turn logic instead.

ops.content:
name: Target AI Vision Test

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      log_level:
        description: 'Log level (info/debug)'
        required: false
        default: 'debug'

jobs:
  test-vision:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    # Optional: Increase timeout if your PCM files are very large
    timeout-minutes: 5

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          # This caches dependencies to make subsequent runs faster
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Initialize Project and Install Dependencies
        run: |
          # Create a package.json if it doesn't exist to enable ESM (import syntax)
          if [ ! -f package.json ]; then
            npm init -y
          fi
          # Ensure the project is treated as an ES Module
          npm pkg set type="module"
          # Install the specific libraries needed for the WebSocket and Supabase
          npm install ws @supabase/supabase-js

      - name: Run Targeted Injection Script
        env:
          # Secrets from GitHub Settings -> Secrets and Variables -> Actions
          GEMINI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}
          SUPABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_URL }}
          SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY }}
          # Force Node to show more detailed warnings if any
          NODE_OPTIONS: "--trace-warnings"
        run: node scripts/test-vision.js

ops.content:
name: Target AI Vision Test

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  test-vision:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          # REMOVED the cache: 'npm' line here to avoid the lock file error

      - name: Initialize and Install Dependencies
        run: |
          # If package.json doesn't exist, create it
          if [ ! -f package.json ]; then
            npm init -y
          fi
          npm pkg set type="module"
          # Install everything needed
          npm install ws @supabase/supabase-js

      - name: Run Targeted Injection Script
        env:
          GEMINI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}
          SUPABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_URL }}
          SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY }}
        run: node scripts/test-vision.js

name: Target AI Vision Test

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  test-vision:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          # REMOVED the cache: 'npm' line here to avoid the lock file error

      - name: Initialize and Install Dependencies
        run: |
          # If package.json doesn't exist, create it
          if [ ! -f package.json ]; then
            npm init -y
          fi
          npm pkg set type="module"
          # Install everything needed
          npm install ws @supabase/supabase-js

      - name: Run Targeted Injection Script
        env:
          GEMINI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}
          SUPABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_URL }}
          SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY }}
        run: node scripts/test-vision.js
